summary: The South Bay funding machine shows no signs of cooling: $4.1B raised across 27 deals in the past six weeks, with heavy hitters like Nexthop AI (Santa Clara, $500M Series B) and SiFive (Santa Clara, $400M Series G) leading the charge. AI and robotics dominate the landscape, from Mind Robotics' $500M raise to a half-dozen emerging players backing plays in autonomous systems and chip design. Hiring remains broadly steady across the region, with seven companies actively expanding teams.
